calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: Conversion-ceiling dissociation diagnostic (tick-budget P2 re-queue of 719): marginal committed-class entropy vs I(state;committed_action) + competence
items.note: DIAGNOSTIC (non_contributory; promotes nothing). Supersedes V3-EXQ-719, which self-routed substrate_not_ready_requeue (only 1/3 seeds cleared the 3000-tick MI floor: P2 ticks 951/10782/1369 -- agent died early on seeds 42/44). FIX: P2 eval is now TICK-BUDGET-DRIVEN (run until P2_TICKS_TARGET=6000 committed P2 ticks OR P2_MAX_EPISODES=400 cap, whichever first) so every seed clears the 3000 floor and per-seed tick counts equalize for comparable MI. Readiness floor unchanged (3000). Everything else identical to 719: all-mechanisms-ON (714 ARM_ON config; sleep OFF); per-tick ground-truth (state_bin, executed committed_class, behaviour); DV1 marginal committed_class_entropy vs DV2 debiased I(state;committed_class) (200x shuffle-null+p95) vs DV3 competence; dissociates genuine monomodal collapse (MECH-309) from decisive state-appropriate commitment (marginal-entropy-artifact hypothesis). episodes_per_run=690 is the MAX (P0 200 + P1 90 + P2_MAX 400); actual P2 episodes are data-dependent (~35 on a surviving seed). Re-derive brake EXEMPT (diagnostic; substrate_not_ready re-queue at adequate budget, the 642->642a pattern). Gates the Track-1 GAP-A-divergence-survival /implement-substrate build. Prefer cloud.

items.title: MECH-446 closure-fire -> latch-armed-occupancy LAG-distribution diagnostic (Move M3): re-anchor the de-commit DV from the vacuous within-arm occupancy-drop to the fire->occupancy lag distribution
items.note: DIAGNOSTIC (claim_ids=[], non_contributory, PROMOTES NOTHING). Move M3 of claim_synthesis_MECH-445-446_2026-07-06.md. Re-anchors the MECH-446 de-commit-authority DV from the recurring-VACUOUS within-arm post-closure occupancy-DROP to the DISTRIBUTION of the tick LAG between each genuine SD-034 closure fire (closure_operator._n_closures increment) and the nearest sustained latch-armed beta occupancy (run >= SUSTAIN_MIN_TICKS=2), on the F-independent use_closure_commit_entry substrate (VALIDATED 460o/460p PASS 2026-06-24). Graded output: seed_median_lag_stats + pooled_coreg_within_horizon_frac (fraction of fires with an occupancy within LAG_HORIZON=10 ticks -- the fraction the 715 falsifier window could ever have scored) -- quantifying exactly how much co-registration the f_dominance de-commit-release amend must buy. ATTRIBUTION GUARD: closure_exclusive_decommit_eval=True makes every measured occupancy closure-formed by construction; ARM_ENTRY_OFF forms no occupancy (censored) = the attribution control. Readiness (self-route, never a verdict): >= 1 measurable seed (guard-competent + >= 1 fire-with-sustained-occupancy) AND >= MIN_LAG_EVENTS=2 fire-with-occupancy events; else substrate_not_ready_requeue. Re-derive brake EXEMPT: new DV MEASUREMENT, not a same-selector de-commit-MAGNITUDE re-derive (that face's brake is FIRED, 7 substrate-ceiling readings). Precondition met: V3-EXQ-715a (Move M1, selection-face lift ON) did NOT co-locate (moderate_f_delta -63). 6 seeds [42-47] (incl. 715's arming seed 44 + 717's armed 46). Mint: 2-arm in-run self-mint ON (arm_cell); separate baseline mint SKIPPED (disqualifier: closure-de-commit substrate is genuinely IN FLUX for this lineage -- the de-commit-release face is under active /implement-substrate build, so the OFF path re-tunes and the fingerprint would correctly refuse a drifted mint; one-shot diagnostic whose successor is /implement-substrate, not a lettered sibling). Prefer cloud. Smoke: dry-run PASS (instrumentation confirmed: ON arm formed a sustained occupancy, closure fire lag=1, attribution control OFF armed=0).

items.title: Coherence non-reducibility retest on cross_stream_binding_substrate (641a harness, binding ON strength 0.5)
items.note: Diagnostic (claim_ids=[], non_contributory, PROMOTES NOTHING). Retest of the V3-EXQ-641a harness (E-orthogonal cross-stream-only coherence read + shuffle-of-real-C contrast-matched control) on the newly-landed cross_stream_binding_substrate (E2Config.cross_stream_binding_enabled=True, strength=0.5). Does NOT supersede 641a (its substrate-ceiling finding stands). ONLY change vs 641a: agent built with binding ON so z_world<->z_self rollout streams share a genuine theta-gated common cause. strength=0.5 pre-registered (injected ~34pct of base per-step z_world delta; measured in substrate smoke test, not tuned to a pass). PASS gate identical to 641a: C_nonreducible_coherence_specific_register on >=4/6 seeds (D1 gated + D3 |corr(E,rawC)|<0.9 + SPEC margin>=0.05). On PASS: register candidate entities/selection.coherence_nonreducibility + close 2026-04-23 binding+path_integral intakes positive. On FAIL: /failure-autopsy (fixed-field inadequate -> V4 learned binder, or close). V4-leaning, off V3 critical path -> priority 100. See docs/architecture/sd_cross_stream_binding_substrate.md.

items.title: REE-native J-lens dispositional-readout diagnostic (J-space existence on all-ON substrate; SD-064 Experiment A)
items.note: DIAGNOSTIC (experiment_purpose=diagnostic, claim_ids=[], PROMOTES/DEMOTES NOTHING; excluded from governance scoring). Experiment A of SD-064 (REE global-workspace claim). Ports Anthropic's J-lens (2026) as a post-hoc READOUT on the EXISTING all-ON substrate (V3-EXQ-714 ARM_ON, identical to V3-EXQ-719a) -- NO new mechanism, measurement only. Tests whether REE has a J-space: a compact (<10% latent activity), action-coupled subspace of z_t that predicts committed_class_{t+H} above a label-permutation null. Ridge linear map + SVD J-space; self-route present/diffuse/substrate_not_ready. SD-064 + MECH-191 referenced for CONTEXT only (diagnostic, so untagged). Experiment B (workspace-ablation cliff) is SUBSTRATE-BLOCKED (SD-027 boundary gate not built in V3) and is NOT queued. Design: REE_assembly/evidence/planning/global_workspace_jlens_plan.md.
